title: 🔥极度低估：安全边际高
body: 市场处于深度低估定投区。AHR999(3D)报0.33触及抄底线，价格较200日成本倒挂16.9%。当前估值已显著低于长期持仓均价，市场抛压衰竭，安全边际极高，属于极佳的风险收益比区间。偏多。恐慌盘出尽了吗？
title_en: 🔥 Extremely Undervalued: High Margin of Safety
body_en: The market is deep in value territory—prime for DCA. AHR999 (3D) is at 0.33, touching the accumulation line. Price is currently inverted 16.9% below the 200-day cost basis. Valuation is significantly below the long-term average holding cost. Selling pressure is exhausted, the margin of safety is massive, and we're looking at an excellent risk/reward setup. Leaning Bullish. Have the panic sellers been flushed out?
